name: template-validate
description: Iterate the deliverable until its deterministic checks are all green. RENAME to <prefix>-validate.
fixPrompt: Fix the deliverable at {{deliverable.path}} so each failing check passes. Add missing sections and write their real content; define any cited-but-undefined source and cite or remove any unused one. Edit only the deliverable file. Replace this prompt with domain-specific guidance.
guardrails: Never invent or fabricate a source to satisfy a citation check.
Never delete a required section to pass the structure check — write it.
Name the specific shortcuts this loop must never take to converge.
onExhausted: Stop. Report which checks still fail and why the deliverable cannot yet pass. Recommend human review.
